context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct CLI package and commands for project setup, knows the available templates, and correctly uses the React hook from @elevenlabs/react with signed URL authentication for client-side conversation sessions.

checklist.name: CLI package install
checklist.description: setup_guide.md includes 'npm install -g @elevenlabs/cli' (or pnpm/yarn equivalent with @elevenlabs/cli) as the CLI installation command

checklist.name: CLI auth command
checklist.description: setup_guide.md includes 'elevenlabs auth login' for authentication

checklist.name: CLI init command
checklist.description: setup_guide.md includes 'elevenlabs agents init' to initialize the project

checklist.name: CLI add with template
checklist.description: setup_guide.md uses 'elevenlabs agents add' with the --template flag to create agents

checklist.name: Customer-service template
checklist.description: setup_guide.md uses the 'customer-service' template name (a valid template from: default, minimal, voice-only, text-only, customer-service, assistant)

checklist.name: CLI push command
checklist.description: setup_guide.md includes 'elevenlabs agents push' to deploy agents to the platform

checklist.name: React hook import
checklist.description: VoiceSupport.jsx imports useConversation from '@elevenlabs/react' (not from '@elevenlabs/client' or '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js')

checklist.name: useConversation usage
checklist.description: VoiceSupport.jsx calls useConversation() hook to manage the conversation

checklist.name: Signed URL session start
checklist.description: VoiceSupport.jsx starts the session using a signedUrl parameter (fetched from backend) rather than a plain agentId

checklist.name: startSession method
checklist.description: VoiceSupport.jsx calls conversation.startSession() (the method from the useConversation hook) to begin the voice session

checklist.name: Language configuration
checklist.description: The component handles language selection that affects which agent is connected to (e.g., different agent IDs for English and Spanish)

checklist.name: Conversation callbacks
checklist.description: VoiceSupport.jsx includes at least one of: onMessage or onUserTranscript callbacks in the useConversation configuration or startSession call
